blocks.content: Kit found out through the group chat.
daisy's going to winter formal with ryan
she seems really happy about it
Kit read the messages, typed nothing, set his away message to: out, and went downstairs for dinner.
She looked at him and went back to her dinner without pressing.
After dinner he went back upstairs and opened the laptop and there was a private message from Daisy, timestamped forty minutes ago.
savannah told me she told you. you ok?
He stared at that for a long time. He thought about every true thing he could type.
He meant it. And it still felt like losing something.
